scripts.dev:web: pnpm dev:ensure && pnpm --filter @usejourney/cli build && AUTH_SECRET=journey-shared-dev-secret concurrently -n auth,mock,api,gui -c blue,green,cyan,magenta --kill-others --handle-input "node examples/petstore.dev/auth-server.mjs" "node examples/petstore.dev/server.mjs" "node packages/cli/dist/index.js serve --project examples/petstore.dev --port 5181" "pnpm --filter @usejourney/gui dev"
scripts.dev:tauri: pnpm dev:ensure && pnpm --filter @usejourney/cli build && AUTH_SECRET=journey-shared-dev-secret concurrently -n auth,mock,api,vite,tauri -c blue,green,cyan,magenta,yellow --kill-others --handle-input "node examples/petstore.dev/auth-server.mjs" "node examples/petstore.dev/server.mjs" "node packages/cli/dist/index.js serve --project examples/petstore.dev --port 5181" "pnpm --filter @usejourney/gui dev" "pnpm --filter @usejourney/gui tauri:dev"
